name: openclaw-install-cn
description: OpenClaw assistant and updater for China mainland / restricted networks - installs via pnpm and npmmirror

scripts.test: node --test src/__tests__/config.test.js src/__tests__/platform.test.js src/__tests__/upgrade.test.js src/__tests__/logger.test.js src/__tests__/completion.test.js src/__tests__/status.test.js src/__tests__/config-cmd.test.js src/__tests__/runtime.test.js
scripts.build:bin: npm run build:win && npm run build:mac-x64 && npm run build:mac-arm64 && npm run build:linux
